Interface ISessionRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
SessionRepository
public interface ISessionRepository
Interface for session data persistence operations. Tracks player login/logout times and session durations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    close(int sessionId, long quitAt, long duration)
    Closes an active session by recording the logout time and total duration.
    CompletableFuture<Optional<SessionModel>>
    findById(int sessionId)
    Finds a session by its unique auto-incrementing ID.
    CompletableFuture<List<SessionModel>>
    findByUuid(UUID uuid)
    Finds all sessions associated with a specific player.
    CompletableFuture<Optional<SessionModel>>
    findOpenByUuid(UUID uuid)
    Finds the currently open session for a player (where quit_at is null).
    CompletableFuture<Integer>
    open(UUID uuid, long joinedAt)
    Records the start of a new player session.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    update(SessionModel session)
    Updates an existing session record.

  • Method Details

    • findById

      CompletableFuture<Optional<SessionModel>> findById(int sessionId)
      Finds a session by its unique auto-incrementing ID.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session ID
      Returns:
      a future containing an optional session model

    • findByUuid

      CompletableFuture<List<SessionModel>> findByUuid(UUID uuid)
      Finds all sessions associated with a specific player.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future containing a list of sessions

    • findOpenByUuid

      CompletableFuture<Optional<SessionModel>> findOpenByUuid(UUID uuid)
      Finds the currently open session for a player (where quit_at is null).
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future containing an optional session model

    • open

      CompletableFuture<Integer> open(UUID uuid, long joinedAt)
      Records the start of a new player session.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      joinedAt - epoch timestamp when the player joined
      Returns:
      a future containing the generated session ID

    • close

      CompletableFuture<Void> close(int sessionId, long quitAt, long duration)
      Closes an active session by recording the logout time and total duration.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the ID of the session to close
      quitAt - epoch timestamp when the player left
      duration - total duration of the session in seconds
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the session is closed

    • update

      CompletableFuture<Void> update(SessionModel session)
      Updates an existing session record.
      Parameters:
      session - the session model with updated data
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the update is finished
